stemHtml: After achieving two-way communication, Mudfield Radar gives the following instruction: "GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF, TRANSMIT FOR IDENTIFICATION AND REPORT HEADING". The pilot should...

options.a: Select IDENT on the transponder and transmit: “HEADING TWO SEVEN ZERO, GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF.”
options.b: Transmit the following message: “HEADING TWO SEVEN ZERO, GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF.”
options.c: Reselect Mode S on the transponder and transmit: “HEADING TWO SEVEN ZERO, GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF.”
options.d: Select SBY on the transponder and transmit: “HEADING TWO SEVEN ZERO, GOLF ALFA CHARLIE ZULU GOLF.”
